def test_mergesort_single_element():
    """Test that mergesort correctly handles a single-element list.
    The buggy code incorrectly uses len(arr) == 0 as base case,
    causing infinite recursion on single-element lists.
    The fixed code should use len(arr) <= 1 as base case.
    """
    assert mergesort([1]) == [1], "Single-element list should sort to itself"
